class.name: AudioStreamMidiSequencer
class.brief_description: Lets you play and schedule MIDI files.
class.description: AudioStreamMidiSequencer lets you play and schedule MIDI data on a beat-based timeline.

method.name: save_to_wav
method.description: Renders the MIDI events as a WAV file to [param path]. [b]Note:[/b] A [code].wav[/code] extension is automatically appended to [param path] if it is missing.

method.name: schedule_midi_buffer_at_beat
method.description: Plays a MIDI data buffer at a certain beat.

method.name: schedule_midi_buffer_at_tick
method.description: Plays a MIDI data buffer at a certain timeline tick. See [constant AudioStreamMidiSequencer.TICKS_PER_BEAT].

method.name: schedule_midi_file_at_beat
method.description: Plays a MIDI file at a certain beat.

method.name: schedule_midi_file_at_tick
method.description: Plays a MIDI file at a certain timeline tick. See [constant AudioStreamMidiSequencer.TICKS_PER_BEAT].

members.member: The tempo of the MIDI timeline, in beats per minute.
